column3: Dedicated Ministry
Chief Minister,Oversees state law and order,police administration,internal security,& Civil Services.
Manages the state budget, fiscal planning, state revenue allocations, treasury control, and socio-economic planning.
land administration, land records, district revenue establishments &emergency response
Controls the construction/maintenance of public buildings, government infrastructure, sports infrastructure, and youth welfare schemes.
Oversees state electricity boards, non-conventional energy development, judicial infrastructure, correctional services, and anti-corruption measures.
Drives rural infrastructure projects, panchayat union schemes, irrigation networks, water security, and rural employment.
Manages primary and secondary schooling, promoting the Tamil language, archaeology, government media relations, and public information.
Controls universities, technical institutions, arts and science colleges, and higher academic regulations across the state.
Directs government hospitals, primary health centres, public healthcare initiatives, and medical entrance/colleges.
Administers the Public Distribution System (PDS), ration card distribution, and food security/essential commodity monitoring.
Promotes industrial growth, handles major manufacturing investments, corporate tie-ups, and special economic zones (SEZs).
Regulates mining policies, mineral extractions, quarry operations, and state-owned geological assets.
Enhances coastal and inland fishing infrastructure, welfare schemes for marine communities, and cold storage networks.
Focuses on livestock health, veterinary clinics, fodder management, and financial schemes for poultry/cattle farmers.
Directs state-run milk cooperatives, procurement from dairy farmers, and quality regulation of commercial dairy products.
Protects reserve forests, manages national parks/sanctuaries, monitors biodiversity conservation, and tackles man-animal conflict.
Handles crop subsidies, agricultural engineering, horticulture production, wasteland development, and organic farming initiatives.
Regulates pollution controls, environmental clearances, coastal zone protection, and climate resilience policies.
Manages town and country planning, slum clearance boards, urban housing projects, and metropolitan development authorities.
Directs cooperative banking networks, agricultural credit societies, and cooperative retail stores across the state.
Boosts local businesses, startups, single-window clearances for small scale units, and industrial estate operations.
Runs state orphanages, women's welfare homes, old-age pensions, and the government's free mid-day school meal scheme.
Formulates tourism promotion strategies, heritage site upkeep, and manages state-owned tourism corporations and hotels.
Supports local weavers, textile mill regulations, and marketing of indigenous handloom and Khadi products.
Governs state GST collections, stamp duties, land/property registration operations, and revenue generation audits.
Controls state transport corporations (buses), regional transport offices (RTOs), licensing, and public commute networks.
Oversees the administration, assets, revenues, and temple management of state-regulated Hindu shrines.
Focuses on state digitisation, IT parks, e-governance applications, and policy framework for emerging tech like AI.
Dedicated to supporting the diaspora, assisting expatriates with legal issues, NRI investments, and emergency evacuations.
Coordinates reservations, educational scholarship programs, and welfare hostel setups for BC, MBC, and denotified communities.
Monitors employment exchanges, factory safety standards, labor unions, minimum wage laws, and youth skill training programs.
Administers state service rules, public sector recruitments, civil servant transfers, and government staff training modules.
Regulates alcohol sales through state-owned channels, manages liquor manufacturing licensing, and handles excise duties.
